option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value:
set -euo pipefail
# Ensure xcodegen / xcodebuild are on PATH — IntelliJ's default env # often misses /opt/homebrew/bin. export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"
ROOT="$(pwd)" MACAPP_DIR="$ROOT/apps/macApp" DERIVED="$ROOT/build/macapp" APP_PATH="$DERIVED/Build/Products/Debug/Jervis.app"
echo "[macApp] Generating xcodeproj from project.yml…" ( cd "$MACAPP_DIR" && xcodegen generate )
echo "[macApp] xcodebuild Debug…" xcodebuild \ -project "$MACAPP_DIR/macApp.xcodeproj" \ -scheme macApp \ -configuration Debug \ -derivedDataPath "$DERIVED" \ -allowProvisioningUpdates \ build
echo "[macApp] Relaunching helper…" pkill -f "$APP_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true rm -f /tmp/jervis-macapp-apns.sock open -g -n "$APP_PATH"
echo "[macApp] Helper launched (menubar-only). Start Compose Desktop via 'Desktop (runPublic)'."
